name: 🗡 You're a Magical Sword Now!
description:
✨️ Sentient magical sword POV ✨️

Why? Maybe you were a hero, defeated by a big bad evil guy and cursed to be locked away in your sword. Or maybe you tripped and fell badly. Anyways, a cocky hero wants to get you, unaware that you're... you.

Works best with a persona with a blank definition.
creator: cloverdemon
